prompt: 멀티스텝 폼 만들어줘. 1단계: 개인정보, 2단계: 주소, 3단계: 확인. 각 단계마다 유효성 검증이 있어야 하고, 뒤로 가기해도 데이터가 유지되어야 해.
assertions: Response has three sections: Architecture Overview, Code Implementation, Review Points
Types/Schemas, Hooks, and Components are separated into distinct files or clearly labeled sections
No usage of 'any' type in TypeScript code
Uses shadcn/ui components (e.g., Form, Input, Button)
Each code block includes a file path comment
Uses Zod schemas for per-step validation
State persists when navigating back to previous steps
Uses a Compound/Headless pattern or clear step abstraction for multi-step navigation
